steps.title: Write the daily distance inequality
steps.content: Whales travel 72 to 77 miles per day. In inequality form: $$72 \le d \le 77$$ where $d$ is the daily distance.

steps.title: Multiply the inequality by 16 for the 16-day total
steps.content: To find total distance $x$ over 16 days, multiply all parts of the inequality by 16. Since we're multiplying by a positive number, the inequality signs don't change: $$16 \times 72 \le x \le 16 \times 77$$ Rewriting in factored form: $$(72)(16) \le x \le (77)(16)$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
